job.title: Business Analyst
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Business Analyst in Montpellier, you bridge the gap between business needs and technical teams. You analyse processes, write specifications, and support transformation projects.
mission.2: Write functional specifications and user stories
mission.4: Act as liaison between business and technical teams
mission.5: Participate in acceptance and validation phases
mission.7: Produce quality deliverables (requirements documents, functional specs)
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in Computer Science, management, or consulting
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in functional analysis
